AnimaPromptComposer: Anima Prompt Composer — compose Anima-canonical prompts via 9 ordered fields and a click-to-add tag palette
AnimaPromptToConditioning: Convert composed prompt to CONDITIONING using a CLIP encoder
AnimaNegativePromptComposer: Compose Anima/OOO_Anima negative prompts from six categories with model-specific preset overrides
AnimaTagPalette: Anima Tag Palette — satellite node with 26 category tabs (hair_color and below); connects to AnimaPromptComposer or writes via DOM injection
